community-specific.name: Community
community-specific.concept: When everyone can create value for the community
community-specific.shortDescription: When everyone can create value for the community — an online space where all members participate
community-specific.creatorModel: Every member can be a creator

the-contest.name: The Contest
the-contest.concept: A competition platform designed for creators
the-contest.shortDescription: A competition platform designed for creators — end-to-end from registration to voting and live streaming

ranking.name: Ranking
ranking.description: Creator rankings by votes and gifts

foxy.name: FOXY
foxy.description: Sexy Idol app — the naughty girls club · Vote, Live, Chat, Call
foxy.about: FOXY is a "Sexy Idol app" — the naughty girls club. An online platform for FOX Members to get in touch with FOXY through features like Vote, Live, Chat, Call, and Secret Album.
foxy.style: "Sexy Idol App" · The Naughty Girls Club
foxy.highlights: Vote · Live · Chat · Call · Secret Album

cupe.name: CupE
cupe.description: Cutesy and lovey idol app — connect members with idols via Vote, Live, Chat, Call
cupe.about: CupE is a cutesy and lovey idol application — an online platform that gives members a convenient way to connect with idols through features like Vote, Live, Chat, Call, and Secret Album.
cupe.highlights: Vote · Live · Chat · Call · Secret Album

cliq.name: CLIQ
cliq.description: 18+ CLIQ creator site — connect creators with fans
cliq.about: CLIQ is for pretty girls, brand ambassadors, MCs, and event talent who want a professional profile, more job opportunities, and easier connections with employers — plus space to create content, grow followers, and earn from their skills long term.
cliq.targetAudience: Brand ambassadors, MCs, and event talent

himbo.name: Himbo
himbo.description: 18+ creator site for Himbo — Vote, Gift, and Live
himbo.about: Himbo is a space for male creators who want to build identity, share lifestyle, and connect with fans through quality content — fashion, fitness, lifestyle, or entertainment. Full tools for monetization and growth at every stage of the creator journey.

lesbie.name: Lesbie
lesbie.description: Girl Love Girl app — Fall in love with the right person · Vote, Live, Chat, Call
lesbie.about: Lesbie is a "Girl Love Girl app" — fall in love with the right person. An online platform for fan clubs (FC) to get in touch with LGBT female idols through features like Vote, Live, Chat, Call, and Secret Album.
lesbie.style: "Girl Love Girl App" · Fall in Love with the Right Person
lesbie.highlights: Vote · Live · Chat · Call · Secret Album
lesbie.targetAudience: Fan clubs (FC) and LGBT female idols

tomboi.name: Tomboi
tomboi.description: 18+ creator site for the Tom community — full monetization
tomboi.about: Tomboi is for tom creators who want their own community — share stories, lifestyle, and work with easier reach to followers, plus systems to earn from fans and grow on a platform that understands identity and community diversity.

bargirl.name: BarGirl
bargirl.description: Bar Girls app — Hot and stylish girls · Vote, Live, Chat, Call
bargirl.about: BarGirl is a Bar Girls app — hot and stylish girls. An online platform for male fans worldwide who love stylish bar girls and their characters, with ways to interact through Vote, Live, Chat, Call, and Secret Album.
bargirl.style: Bar Girls App · Hot and Stylish Girls
bargirl.highlights: Vote · Live · Chat · Call · Secret Album
bargirl.targetAudience: Male fans worldwide and bar girls

silom.name: Silom
silom.description: Silom 18+ community — every member can post and participate
silom.about: Silom is a community for LGBTQ+ creators and users who want space to express themselves, create content, and connect with like-minded people — on a platform that values diversity, safety, and earning from work, and supports everyone building their own community freely.

cosplay-plus.name: Cosplay Plus
cosplay-plus.description: Cosplay creator hub — multiple styles in one site
cosplay-plus.about: Cosplay Plus is a community for cosplayers, creators, and fandom lovers — a place to show work, build community, and connect with fans across the country, with systems to earn from content, events, and follower support on one platform.

expat-idols.name: Expat Idols
expat-idols.description: Expat Models app — worldwide friendships · Vote, Live, Chat, Call
expat-idols.about: Expat Idols is an Expat Models app — worldwide friendships. An online platform for foreign male and female models living in Thailand to interact and communicate, with features for fan clubs (FC) to connect with their favorite models such as Vote, Live, Chat, Call, and Secret Album.
expat-idols.highlights: Vote · Live · Chat · Call · Secret Album
expat-idols.targetAudience: Expat models in Thailand and fan clubs (FC)

beauty-queen.name: Beauty Queen
beauty-queen.description: Beauty Queen contest platform — vote and support contestants
beauty-queen.about: Beauty Queen is for pageant contestants, models, and beauty creators — identity, portfolios, and fan connections in the same scene, plus tools to earn and grow career opportunities from contestants to public figures.

nak-sueksa.name: นักศึกษา
nak-sueksa.description: 18+ student community — members post, share ideas, and participate
nak-sueksa.about: A platform for students starting as creators — build work, grow followers, and earn from their skills, whether content, lifestyle, or a specialty. A community where the next generation can learn, grow, and create new opportunities together.

mrfox-ecosystem-launch.title: Mr.FOX Launches Creator Economy Platform Ecosystem
mrfox-ecosystem-launch.excerpt: 3 platform types covering Creator, Community, and Contest
mrfox-ecosystem-launch.content: Mr.FOX announces a full-stack ecosystem for the Creator Economy, with monetization through votes, gifts, live streaming, subscriptions, and more.

foxy-app-update.title: FOXY App Update: New Live and Gift Features
foxy-app-update.excerpt: Adds animated gifts and improves the live streaming experience
foxy-app-update.content: FOXY launches a new animated gift collection and upgrades live rooms to support more concurrent viewers.

creator-platform-engine.title: Creator Platform Engine — Standard Template for Every App
creator-platform-engine.excerpt: A new engine helps launch creator platforms faster
creator-platform-engine.content: Mr.FOX develops the Creator Platform Engine as a standard template supporting wallet, votes, gifts, chat, live streaming, and video calls.
